Lessons > 13. More Practice: While Loops & If Statements

Today’s lesson will be a continued discussion of While Loops. See Lesson 12 for reference materials.

Today's Activities

For today, please do the following:

1. Download the Exercise Files

Exercise Files

2. Review the Slides

  1. Supplementary Slides for Live Lecture

3. Watch the Lecture Video(s)

Link Title Type Duration
Video 1 Practice with while loops lecture 51:38

4. Take the Practice (Ungraded) Quiz

Note: The quiz is to help you test your own understanding of the concepts. It is not graded, and is designed to help you to see what you already know and what you should review / ask about.
